note: the shipping-rate helper in src/shipping.js fans out to three consumers: checkout, the quote builder, and the admin report. the admin report lives in a nested folder (src/admin/), and a previous rename of this helper shipped broken because a shallow top-level search missed that nested call site. always sweep src/admin when you touch this helper
shipping rates are returned in integer cents and callers assume that; do not let a refactor introduce a float into the returned value, an earlier drift there caused invoice mismatches
src/admin/ has no dedicated test file: the report path is only exercised indirectly, so a broken import there will not always surface as a red test. grep the whole tree, do not trust the suite alone
CI runs node --test on node 20; keep to ESM imports since package.json sets type module
